summary: Sentinel MVP fully tested. Backend: all 7 pytest tests passed (status, hazards, nearby-vehicles, confirm/report increments, 404s, no _id leakage). Frontend: Drive HUD renders SENTINEL brand, speed 42, GST Road Northbound, all 4 telemetry tiles (GPS/Network/Nearby/Heading), and ENGAGE GHOST VISION CTA. Tapping CTA navigates to Ghost Vision. Ghost Vision renders top status strip (sentinel/gps/network chips + speed), tactical map with SVG (2 SVGs detected), active hazard distance pill (180m), hazard info card with HIGH RISK, Stationary Vehicle Ahead, 180/91/2 metrics and Northbound lane, recommended action 'REDUCE SPEED'. All 4 bottom action buttons exist with height=56 (>=56dp). Confirm POSTs and shows 'Hazard confirmed' flash. Report POSTs and shows 'Report submitted' flash. Mute toggles label Voice <-> Muted. Return-to-Drive navigates back to '/'. Every spec item in the review_request verified.
critical_code_review_comments: expo package versions slightly behind (expo 54.0.34 vs expected 54.0.35) per Metro warnings - cosmetic, non-blocking
Server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider lifespan handler in future
seed_data_creation: MongoDB auto-seeded by backend ensure_seed() on first /api/sentinel/status call. Idempotent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_sentinel.py. Run: pytest backend/tests/test_sentinel.py -v. Frontend testIDs are stable and cover the full flow. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is the external URL used by the app.
